specs.name: つるぎのまい
specs.en: Raises the user's Attack by 2 stages.

specs.name: ふきとばし
specs.en: Always moves last (priority -6); forces the opposing Pokemon to switch out for a random party member. In wild battles ends the battle. Always hits regardless of the user's accuracy or the target's evasion; bypasses protection moves and Substitute.

effects.wild_battle: ends the battle instead of switching

specs.name: ほえる
specs.en: Always moves last (priority -6); forces the opposing Pokemon to switch out for a random party member. In wild battles ends the battle. Sound-based. Always hits regardless of the user's accuracy or the target's evasion; bypasses protection moves and Substitute.

effects.wild_battle: ends the battle instead of switching

specs.name: うたう
specs.en: Puts the target to sleep. Sound-based; bypasses Substitute.

specs.name: かなしばり
specs.en: For 4 turns the target cannot use the move it last used.

specs.name: やどりぎのタネ
specs.en: Each turn drains 1/8 of the target's max HP and heals the user by that amount; the effect carries over if the user switches out. No effect on Grass types.

specs.name: せいちょう
specs.en: Raises the user's Attack and Special Attack by 1 stage each; by 2 stages each in harsh sunlight.

specs.name: どくのこな
specs.en: Poisons the target. No effect on Poison, Steel, or Grass types, Pokemon with the Overcoat ability, or holders of Safety Goggles.

specs.name: しびれごな
specs.en: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Electric or Grass types, Pokemon with the Overcoat ability, or holders of Safety Goggles.

specs.name: ねむりごな
specs.en: Puts the target to sleep. No effect on Grass types, Pokemon with the Overcoat ability, or holders of Safety Goggles.

specs.name: いとをはく
specs.en: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

specs.name: でんじは
specs.en: Paralyzes the target. No effect on Ground or Electric types.

specs.name: どくどく
specs.en: Badly poisons the target (damage increases each turn 1/16, 2/16, 3/16...). Always hits if used by a Poison-type; no effect on Poison or Steel types.

effects.note: badly poisoned: turn-end damage increases by 1/16 of max HP each turn (1/16, 2/16, 3/16...)

specs.name: さいみんじゅつ
specs.en: Puts the target to sleep.

specs.name: こうそくいどう
specs.en: Raises the user's Speed by 2 stages.

specs.name: いやなおと
specs.en: Lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages. Sound move that bypasses Substitute.

specs.name: かげぶんしん
specs.en: Raises the user's evasion by 1 stage.

specs.name: じこさいせい
specs.en: Restores HP equal to half of the user's max HP.

specs.name: ちいさくなる
specs.en: Raises the user's evasion by 2 stages, but afterwards certain stomping/diving moves always hit it and deal double damage.

effects.effect: listed moves always hit this user and deal double damage while minimized
affected_moves: ハイパーダーククラッシャー

specs.name: あやしいひかり
specs.en: Confuses the target for 1 to 4 turns.

specs.name: ひかりのかべ
specs.en: For 5 turns, halves special-attack damage taken by the user's side (2/3 instead of half with multiple allies); critical hits ignore it; persists through switching.

specs.name: くろいきり
specs.en: Resets all stat stage changes of every Pokemon on the field to normal.

effects.effect: resets all stat stage changes (all stats) of every Pokemon on the field to 0

specs.name: きあいだめ
specs.en: The user becomes Focus Energy (critical-hit stage +2), making its moves more likely to land critical hits. Fails if already in that state.

effects.effect: raises the user's critical-hit ratio for its own moves

specs.name: ドわすれ
specs.en: Raises the user's Special Defense by 2 stages.

specs.name: へびにらみ
specs.en: Paralyzes the target. Does not affect Electric-type Pokemon.

specs.name: へんしん
specs.en: User temporarily transforms into the target, copying its species number, graphics, stats, IVs, stat ranks, ability, and moves. HP, held item, and status conditions are not copied and remain the user's own; all copied moves get 5 PP. Reverts when the user switches out. If the target is Dynamaxed, the user copies the pre-Dynamax form.

effects.notes: copies the pre-Dynamax form if the target is Dynamaxed

specs.name: とける
specs.en: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

specs.name: みがわり
specs.en: User loses 1/4 of its max HP to create a substitute with HP equal to that amount; the substitute takes all attacks in the user's place until its HP reaches 0. The substitute cannot be inflicted with status conditions, but sound-based moves and similar pass through and hit the user directly. It blocks the opponent's Dynamax moves, but the substitute disappears if the user Dynamaxes.

effects.hp: equal to HP lost (1/4 max HP)
effects.absorbs: all attacks until its HP reaches 0

specs.name: のろい
specs.en: If the user is Ghost-type, it loses half its max HP and inflicts the Curse status on the target; the cursed target loses 1/4 of its max HP each turn. If the user is not Ghost-type, the user lowers its own Speed by 1 stage and raises its Attack and Defense by 1 stage each.

effects.notes: recurring damage each turn while cursed

specs.name: わたほうし
specs.en: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages. No effect on Grass-type Pokemon, Pokemon with the Overcoat ability, or Pokemon holding Safety Goggles.

specs.name: うらみ
specs.en: Reduces the PP of the target's last used move by 4.

specs.name: まもる
specs.en: Priority +4 move. This turn the user takes no moves from the opponent. Using it consecutively increases the chance of failure: it succeeds the first time, and each consecutive use makes the success rate 1/3 of the previous (failing resets it). Dynamax move and Generation 7 Z-Move attacking moves break through, dealing 1/4 of the damage.

specs.name: こわいかお
specs.en: Lowers the target's Speed by 2 stages.

specs.name: てんしのキッス
specs.en: Confuses the target for 1 to 4 turns.

specs.name: はらだいこ
specs.en: User loses half of its max HP to raise its Attack to the maximum (+6 stages).

specs.name: まきびし
specs.en: Sets a trap on the opponent's side; opponents take damage each time they switch in. Can be stacked up to 3 times: 1 layer deals 1/8 of max HP, 2 layers deal 1/6, and 3 layers deal 1/4. Flying-type Pokemon and Pokemon with the Levitate ability take no damage.

specs.name: ほろびのうた
specs.en: All Pokemon on the field when used faint at the end of 3 turns; switching out cancels the effect for that Pokemon. Sound move; hits through Substitute.

effects.effect: every Pokemon active when this move was used faints at the end of the 3rd turn (perish count: 3,2,1,faint)
effects.applies_to: all Pokemon on the field when the move was used, including the user
effects.ends_if: an affected Pokemon switches out (counter resets/clears for that Pokemon)

specs.name: みきり
specs.en: Priority +4. Protects the user from the opponent's moves this turn. Consecutive use lowers success rate to 1/3 each time (resets on failure). Dynamax moves and Gen7 Z-Move attacks break through, dealing 1/4 damage.

effects.effect: the user does not take the opponent's moves this turn

fails_if.detail: succeeds first use, then success probability becomes 1/3 of the previous on each consecutive use; resets when it fails or a non-protect move is used

partial_block.note: these still hit the user but deal 1/4 of normal damage

specs.name: すなあらし
specs.en: Sets sandstorm weather for 5 turns. Pokemon that are not Rock/Ground/Steel take 1/16 max HP damage each turn. Rock-type Pokemon get x1.5 Special Defense.

effects.note: 1/16 of max HP each turn during sandstorm
active while sandstorm is in effect

specs.name: こらえる
specs.en: Priority +4. The user survives with 1 HP any attack that turn that would cause it to faint. Consecutive use lowers success rate to 1/3 each time (resets on failure).

effects.effect: any attack this turn that would reduce the user to 0 HP instead leaves it with 1 HP

fails_if.detail: succeeds first use, then success probability becomes 1/3 of the previous on each consecutive use; resets when it fails or a non-protect move is used

specs.name: あまえる
specs.en: Lowers the target's Attack by 2 stages.

specs.name: いばる
specs.en: Confuses the target for 1-4 turns but raises the target's Attack by 2 stages.

specs.name: くろいまなざし
specs.en: Non-Ghost targets cannot flee or switch out. Effect ends if the user leaves the field.

effects.effect: target cannot flee or switch out

specs.name: いやしのすず
specs.en: Cures the status conditions of the user and all team members. Sound move; works even on team members behind a Substitute. Not blocked by Max Guard.

effects.note: cures status conditions of the user and all party Pokemon

specs.name: しんぴのまもり
specs.en: For 5 turns, sets Safeguard on the user's side so the user and allies cannot be statused or confused. Persists through switching.

effects.effect: the user and allies cannot be inflicted with status conditions or confusion

specs.name: あさのひざし
specs.en: Heals HP: 1/2 max HP in normal weather, 2/3 in harsh sunlight, 1/4 in rain/snow/sandstorm.

specs.name: こうごうせい
specs.en: Heals HP: 1/2 max HP in normal weather, 2/3 in harsh sunlight, 1/4 in rain/snow/sandstorm.

specs.name: つきのひかり
specs.en: Heals HP: 1/2 max HP in normal weather, 2/3 in harsh sunlight, 1/4 in rain/snow/sandstorm.

specs.name: あまごい
specs.en: For 5 turns set the weather to Rain; Water moves deal x1.5 damage and Fire moves deal x0.5 damage.

specs.name: にほんばれ
specs.en: For 5 turns set the weather to Harsh Sunlight; Fire moves deal x1.5 damage, Water moves deal x0.5 damage, and no Pokemon can be frozen.

specs.name: じこあんじ
specs.en: Copy all of the target's stat-rank changes onto the user.

specs.name: たくわえる
specs.en: Raise the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 each, and add one Stockpile count (up to 3) which boosts Swallow/Spit Up.

effects.note: increases the effect of のみこむ (Swallow) and はきだす (Spit Up)

specs.name: のみこむ
specs.en: Heal HP based on the user's Stockpile count (1=1/4, 2=1/2, 3=full max HP), then reset the Defense/Special Defense ranks raised by Stockpile and clear the Stockpile count.

effects.note: removes the Defense/Special Defense rank boosts that たくわえる had granted and resets the Stockpile count to 0

specs.name: いちゃもん
specs.en: After use, the target cannot use the same move twice in a row; no effect on a Dynamaxed target.

effects.effect: target cannot select the same move it used last on consecutive turns
effects.note: this is the Torment effect (consecutive same-move lock), not the Taunt status-move lock

specs.name: おだてる
specs.en: Confuse the target for 1-4 turns but also raise the target's Special Attack by 1.

specs.name: おにび
specs.en: Burn the target; no effect on Fire-type targets.

specs.name: おきみやげ
specs.en: The user faints, and in exchange the target's Attack and Special Attack are each lowered by 2.

specs.name: このゆびとまれ
specs.en: Priority +2; this turn the user draws in and takes all of the opponents' moves that target a single Pokemon; spread/all-target moves are unaffected. Double-battle move.

effects.note: all single-target moves from opponents this turn are redirected to the user

specs.name: じゅうでん
specs.en: The user becomes Charged so that its next Electric-type move has x2 power (one-time use; up to gen 8 it only lasted until the next turn), and raises the user's Special Defense by 1.

effects.note: persists until the user uses an Electric move; in gen 8 and earlier it expired at the end of the next turn

specs.name: トリック
specs.en: Swap the held items of the user and the target; succeeds even if only one side is holding an item.

effects.note: succeeds even when only one side holds an item

specs.name: なりきり
specs.en: Copy the target's ability onto the user; some unique abilities cannot be copied.

exceptions.reason: certain unique abilities cannot be copied

specs.name: ねがいごと
specs.en: At the end of the next turn, restore half of max HP; if switched out, the Pokemon in the same slot is healed instead.

note_structured.if_user_switched_out: the Pokemon occupying the same slot at that turn end is healed

specs.name: ねをはる
specs.en: User restores 1/16 of max HP each turn but can no longer switch out; if Flying-type or Levitate, Ground moves now hit it.

effects.effect: user cannot switch out or flee
Ground-type moves can hit the user even if Flying-type or having Levitate

specs.name: あくび
specs.en: Inflict Drowsy on the target; at the end of next turn the target falls Asleep, but the effect is removed if the target switches out. Always hits regardless of accuracy/evasion.

effects.removed_if: target switches out before it triggers

effects.effect: always hits regardless of the user's accuracy or the target's evasion

immune.reason: cannot apply if the target already cannot be put to sleep

specs.name: スキルスワップ
specs.en: Swap the user's and target's abilities; some unique abilities cannot be swapped; no effect on a Dynamaxed target.

effects.effect: exchange the user's ability with the target's ability

exceptions.reason: certain unique abilities cannot be swapped

specs.name: フェザーダンス
specs.en: Lower the target's Attack by 2 stages.

specs.name: フラフラダンス
specs.en: Confuse the target for 1 to 4 turns.

specs.en: Lower the target's Special Defense by 2 stages.

specs.name: きんぞくおん

specs.en: Lower the target's Attack and Defense by 1 stage each.

specs.name: コスモパワー
specs.en: Raise the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage each.

specs.name: てっぺき
specs.en: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

specs.name: とおせんぼう
specs.en: Prevents the target (if not a Ghost type) from fleeing or switching out; effect ends when the user leaves the field.

effects.effect: target cannot flee or switch out

specs.name: とおぼえ
specs.en: Raises the Attack of the user and all allies by 1 stage; a sound move from Gen 8 (Gen 7 and earlier it affected only the user). Not blocked by Max Guard.

effects.note: Gen 8 onward affects all allies; Gen 7 and earlier affected only the user

specs.name: ビルドアップ
specs.en: Raises the user's Attack and Defense by 1 stage each.

specs.name: めいそう
specs.en: Raises the user's Special Attack and Special Defense by 1 stage each.

specs.name: りゅうのまい
specs.en: Raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage each.

specs.name: はねやすめ
specs.en: Restores half of the user's max HP, but the user loses its Flying type for that turn.

effects.effect: user is not Flying type for this turn

specs.name: いやしのねがい
specs.en: The user faints; in exchange, the next Pokemon sent out in its place has its status condition and HP fully restored. Unlike Lunar Dance, PP is not restored.

effects.effect: user faints

effects.trigger: a Pokemon switches into the user's slot
effects.effect: fully restores the incoming Pokemon's HP

effects.trigger: a Pokemon switches into the user's slot
effects.effect: fully cures the incoming Pokemon's status conditions

specs.name: おいかぜ
specs.en: For 4 turns, the Speed of the user and its allies is doubled.

effects.effect: doubles Speed of the user and its allies for 4 turns

specs.name: つぼをつく
specs.en: Randomly raises one of Attack, Defense, Special Attack, Special Defense, Speed, evasion, or accuracy by 2 stages. Not blocked by Max Guard.

specs.name: まねっこ
specs.en: Uses the last move that was used by any Pokemon, targeting the opponent; the user's own moves are also eligible. If the last move was a Max Move, the move it was based on is used.

effects.effect: copies and uses the most recently used move (including the user's own moves)
effects.note: if the last move was a Max Move, the base move is used instead

specs.name: パワースワップ
specs.en: Swaps the user's and the target's Attack and Special Attack stat stages.

effects.effect: swaps the user's and target's Attack and Special Attack stat stages

specs.name: ガードスワップ
specs.en: Swap the user's and target's Defense and Special Defense stat stages.

effects.detail: exchange the user's and the target's Defense and Special Defense stat stages

specs.name: どくびし
specs.en: Set Toxic Spikes on the opponent's side; each Pokemon switching in is poisoned (badly poisoned at 2 layers). Poison/Steel/Flying/Levitate are immune; a grounded Poison-type entering removes it.

effects.trigger: a grounded Poison-type Pokemon switches in on this side

immune.reason: Toxic Spikes does not poison these on entry
Flying-type or Levitate are not grounded and avoid the hazard

specs.name: アクアリング
specs.en: After use, the user restores 1/16 of its max HP at the end of each turn.

effects.detail: recover 1/16 of max HP every turn while the user remains in battle

specs.name: でんじふゆう
specs.en: For 5 turns the user becomes airborne (like Levitate), unaffected by Ground-type moves, entry hazards (Spikes/Toxic Spikes/Sticky Web), and terrain effects.

effects.detail: user gains a Levitate-like airborne state and is treated as not grounded

specs.name: ロックカット
specs.en: Raise the user's Speed by 2 stages.

specs.name: すりかえ
specs.en: Swap the user's held item with the target's held item; succeeds even if only one side holds an item.

effects.detail: exchange the user's held item with the target's held item; works even if only one of the two is holding an item

fails_if.reason: fails only when neither the user nor the target holds an item

specs.name: わるだくみ
specs.en: Raise the user's Special Attack by 2 stages.

specs.name: きりばらい

effects.detail: removes entry hazards from both the user's and the opponent's sides

fails_if.reason: if the target has a Substitute, only the evasion-lowering effect fails while the clearing effects still occur

specs.name: ステルスロック
specs.en: Set Stealth Rock on the opponent's side; each Pokemon switching in takes damage scaled by Rock-type effectiveness (1/8 max HP at neutral, e.g. 1/2 at a 4x weakness).

on_switch_in.scaling: multiplied by the Rock-type type effectiveness against the entering Pokemon

specs.name: ワイドガード
specs.en: Priority +3. This turn the user and its allies are protected from moves that target multiple Pokemon.

effects.detail: the user and its allies do not take moves that target multiple Pokemon (from either opponents or allies) for this turn

specs.name: ガードシェア
specs.en: Add the user's and target's Defense, then split it evenly between them; do the same for Special Defense.

effects.detail: sum the user's and target's actual Defense values and give each half, then do the same for Special Defense

specs.name: パワーシェア
specs.en: Add the user's and target's Attack, then split it evenly between them; do the same for Special Attack.

effects.detail: sum the user's and target's actual Attack values and give each half, then do the same for Special Attack

specs.name: ワンダールーム
specs.en: For 5 turns, all Pokemon have their Defense and Special Defense stats swapped. Using it again cancels the effect.

effects.effect: all Pokemon have their Defense and Special Defense stats swapped

specs.name: いかりのこな
specs.en: Priority +2. This turn the user redirects all of the opponents' moves onto itself; has no effect on spread/all-target moves. Grass types and Pokemon with the Overcoat ability or Safety Goggles are immune.

effects.effect: user becomes the target of single-target moves used by opponents this turn

specs.name: ちょうのまい
specs.en: Raises the user's Special Attack, Special Defense and Speed by 1 stage each.

specs.name: みずびたし
specs.en: Changes the target's type to Water only.

effects.effect: target becomes pure Water type

specs.name: とぐろをまく
specs.en: Raises the user's Attack, Defense and accuracy by 1 stage each.

specs.name: なかまづくり
specs.en: Changes the target's ability to be the same as the user's ability. No effect on a Dynamaxed target.

effects.effect: target's ability becomes the same as the user's current ability

specs.en: Makes the target able to act immediately after this move resolves, regardless of its Speed. For double battles.

effects.effect: target acts immediately after this move resolves, ignoring its Speed

specs.name: ファストガード
specs.en: Priority +3. This turn the user and its allies are protected from the opponents' priority (increased-priority) moves, including priority granted by abilities.

effects.effect: user and allies are protected from opponents' increased-priority moves this turn
effects.blocks: moves with priority above normal, including priority granted by abilities

specs.name: サイドチェンジ
specs.en: Priority +2. Swaps the positions of the user and one ally. For double battles. From Gen 9, using it consecutively makes it fail more easily: it succeeds the first time, then each consecutive use has its success chance multiplied to 1/3; a failure resets this.

effects.effect: swaps the battlefield positions of the user and one ally

fails_if.effect: first use succeeds; success rate becomes 1/3 of previous on each consecutive use, reset on failure

specs.en: Lowers the user's Defense and Special Defense by 1 stage each, and raises its Attack, Special Attack and Speed by 2 stages each.

specs.en: Restores the target's HP by 1/2 of its maximum HP. (Best used on an ally in double battles.)

effects.effect: target recovers 1/2 of its maximum HP

specs.name: さきおくり

effects.effect: target's action is moved to last this turn, ignoring its Speed

specs.name: ミラータイプ

effects.note: if target is Terastallized, copy the Tera type; but if target is Terastallized into Stellar, copy the target's original types instead

specs.name: コットンガード

effects.note: applies to all grounded Pokemon while terrain is active
x1.5 up to Gen7, x1.3 from Gen8
triggers even for non-grounded Pokemon holding Grassy Seed

attacker that hits with a contact move loses 1/8 of its max HP
first use succeeds; each repeated consecutive use multiplies success chance by 1/3; failure resets the counter

specs.en: Lower the target's Special Attack by 2 stages.

fails_if.success_rate: 1/3 each consecutive turn, resets on failure

specs.name: ねばねばネット

triggers even for non-grounded Pokemon

specs.name: すてゼリフ
specs.en: Lowers the opponent's Attack and Special Attack by 1 each, then the user switches out with a party Pokemon. Sound-based move; bypasses the opponent's Substitute.

specs.name: さいはい
specs.en: Forces the target to immediately use again the move it last used. Moves with recoil like Hyper Beam, charging/multi-turn moves, Max moves, and certain moves like Max Guard fail.

Grounded Pokemon (not Flying type, not Levitate, etc.) cannot be hit by the opponent's priority moves (not ally priority moves), and Psychic-type move power is x1.3 (x1.5 up to Gen 7). triggers even for non-grounded Pokemon

specs.name: トーチカ
specs.en: Priority +4; this turn protect against the opponent's attacks, and poison any attacker that hits with a contact move. Consecutive use lowers success rate to 1/3 each time (resets on failure). Max moves (and Gen 7 Z-Power damaging moves) break through and deal 1/4 damage.

fails_if.success_rate: 1/3 each consecutive turn, resets on failure

specs.name: ちからをすいとる
specs.en: Heals the user by an amount equal to the target's Attack stat value, and lowers the target's Attack by 1. If the stat cannot be lowered (e.g. due to an ability), only the heal occurs. Fails if the target's Attack is already at its lowest stage.

effects.amount: equal to target's current Attack stat value

effects.note: if stat cannot be lowered, only the heal applies

specs.name: オーロラベール
specs.en: Usable only while the weather is Snow. For 5 turns, halves physical and special damage the user's side takes from the opponent (x2/3 instead of half when there are multiple allies). Critical hits ignore the reduction. The effect persists through switching.

specs.name: どくのいと
specs.en: Poisons the target and lowers its Speed by 2 (was 1 up to Pokemon SV / earlier).

effects.note: was -1 up to Pokemon SV

specs.name: なみだめ
specs.en: Lowers the target's Attack and Special Attack by 1 each. Always hits regardless of the user's accuracy or target's evasion. Bypasses the target's Protect, Detect, Baneful Bunker, Spiky Shield, King's Shield, Silk Trap, and Burning Bulwark (but is blocked by Max Guard).

specs.name: ほおばる
specs.en: Immediately consumes the user's held Berry to trigger its effect, then raises the user's Defense by 2.

effects.effect: consume held Berry and trigger its effect

specs.name: まほうのこな
specs.en: Changes the target's type to Psychic. No effect on Grass-type Pokemon or those with the Overcoat ability or holding Safety Goggles.

specs.name: デコレーション
specs.en: Raises the target's Attack and Special Attack by 2 stages each (mainly used on an ally in Double Battles).

specs.name: ふしょくガス
specs.en: Removes the held item from any Pokemon holding one (the item is permanently destroyed, not stolen).

specs.name: コーチング
specs.en: Raises the Attack and Defense of all allies (excluding the user) by 1 stage each (for Double Battles).

specs.name: たてこもる
specs.en: Raises the user's Defense by 2 stages.

specs.name: ハバネロエキス
specs.en: Raises the target's Attack by 2 stages and lowers the target's Defense by 2 stages.

specs.name: しっぽきり
specs.en: The user loses half its max HP to create a Substitute, then switches out to a party Pokemon while passing the Substitute. The Substitute's HP is 1/4 of the user's max HP.

specs.name: さむいギャグ
specs.en: Switches the user out to a party Pokemon, and sets the weather to Snow for 5 turns (Ice-types get 1.5x Defense in Snow).

specs.name: おかたづけ
specs.en: Removes both Pokemon's Substitutes and clears Spikes, Stealth Rock, Sticky Web, and Toxic Spikes from both sides of the field, then raises the user's Attack and Speed by 1 stage each.

specs.name: ゆきげしき
specs.en: Sets the weather to Snow for 5 turns (Ice-types get 1.5x Defense in Snow).

specs.name: ドラゴンエール
specs.en: Gives all allies excluding the user a +1 critical-hit rank (Focus Energy state), raising their future moves' critical-hit chance; +2 ranks if the ally is Dragon-type. Fails if the ally is already in that state. Sound-based move.

merges.reason: 単複の表記ゆれ。同一効果(自他のもちものを入れ替え)。複数形に統一。
守る系の防御効果で同義。protect(×6)が多数派なのでそちらに統合。
技威力を変動させる効果で同義。粒度を揃えてmodify_move_powerへ統合(boost/charge/modifyの乱立を解消する観点)。
次回技威力を高める効果で、modify_move_powerの一種。命名を統一。
能力ランク/倍率変化はstatの範疇。stat(×85)に統合し粒度を揃える。
能力値を共有/入れ替える効果。基準語彙swap_statsへ寄せる(share/swap/copyの分裂を統合)。
相手の能力ランク変化をコピーする効果。stat入れ替え系として基準語彙swap_statsへ集約。
強制交代系。ただし対象が異なる可能性あり(自分か相手か)。命名整理が必要。注: 対象が相手なら別kindに分けるべき(issues参照)。
設置物(まきびし等)を除去する効果で同義。remove_hazardに統一。
リフレクター/ひかりのかべ等の壁の操作。基準語彙set_screenの逆操作だが、screen操作kindとして集約検討(命名はissues参照)。
自身のタイプを変更する効果。set/change/addのタイプ操作の表記ゆれ。set_typeに集約。
「対象のタイプ変更」と「対象の技タイプ変更」が混同されている可能性。基準語彙change_target_move_typeとの粒度確認が必要。注: 真にタイプ自体を変えるならset_type系に寄せるべき(issues参照)。

issues: タイプ操作系が分裂: add_type(×2), change_type, set_type, suppress_type, change_target_type が併存。『付与(add)/上書き(set)/無効化(suppress)』で意味が異なるため、安易な統合は危険。最低限 set_type/change_type は統一しつつ、add_type と suppress_type は別kindとして温存すべき。
交代/移動の強制系が混在: force_switch_out, switch_self_out, force_move, force_next_to_move, force_last_to_move, force_move。『自分が出ていく』『相手を引きずり出す』『行動順を操作する』は本質的に別効果。対象(self/target)と効果(交代/行動順)を軸に再分類が必要。

壁(screen)操作の粒度不一致: 基準語彙 set_screen に対し remove_screen が分離。set/remove を統一kind+方向フラグにするか、両方を正式kindとするか方針決定が必要。同様に hazard(set_hazard/remove_hazard/clear_hazards)、terrain(set_terrain/remove_terrain)、field(set_field)も set/remove の対称性を揃えるべき。
技威力操作系が乱立: modify_move_power, boost_move_power, charge_move_power, stat_multiplier(技威力に作用する場合), boost_ally_move_power(基準), recoil_attacker。modify を上位kindに、boost/charge は方向・タイミング属性で表現するのが望ましい。
能力値操作系の粒度: stat(×85)が肥大化。stat_multiplier, copy_stat_changes, share_stats, swap_stats(基準) が周辺にある。stat は『自他の能力ランク増減』に限定し、入れ替え/コピー/共有は swap_stats 系へ寄せる線引きを明文化すべき。
アイテム操作系: swap_item/swap_items(表記ゆれ), restore_consumed_item(基準), remove_item, force_eat_berry(基準)。swap は単複統一が必須。remove_item と restore_consumed_item は別効果として妥当。
特性操作系: set_ability(基準), swap_ability, suppress_ability(基準)。set/swap/suppress は意味が異なるため統合不可だが、命名規約(動詞_ability)は揃っており良好。
状態異常系: status(×25), prevent_status(×2), cure_status(基準×3), force_eat_berry。prevent_status と cure_status(基準)は別効果として妥当。status(×25)は『状態異常を付与』の意味だと思われるが、apply_status など意図が明確な命名への改名を検討。
set_protection を protect に統合する際、protect が『守る(行動)』と『状態(まもり状態の付与)』の両義になっていないか確認が必要。意味が二重なら分離を検討。
call系: call_random_own_move(基準), call_last_used_move。後者は基準語彙の call_last_used_move に近いが、call系の命名規約(call_*)で統一されているか確認。

ground_immunity_override, suppress_type, bypass_accuracy, pierced_by, block_priority_moves, consecutive_use_fail, prevent_escape, trap, trap_self など単発(×1)kindが多数。trap と trap_self は対象違いで別kind妥当。これら低頻度kindは綴り・命名規約の統一(動詞先頭/受動形 pierced_by の混入)を点検すべき。
